description: Unique identifier for the Facebook Ads campaign. Joins to basic_campaign.campaign_id.
The date when the campaign performance metrics were recorded.
Sequential index or row number used for internal reference or ordering within a batch.
The type of user action being measured (e.g., link_click, page_engagement, post_engagement, purchase, view_content, lead).
Numeric value associated with the action type - typically the count, cost, or conversion value.
Metric value attributed to a 1-day view-through window - actions that occurred within 1 day after viewing an ad.
Metric value attributed to a 7-day click-through window - actions that occurred within 7 days after clicking an ad.
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row. Internal metadata, never expose to users.
